title: Lively Spiced Catalan Turnip Roast
description: A bright, spicy vegan roast featuring turnips, aromatic spices, and a final broil for crisp edges—perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°C and set the rack in the middle position.
Wash, peel, and cube the turnips into bite‑sized pieces.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, sumac, oregano, rosemary, minced garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until well blended.
Toss the cubed turnips in the spice mixture until evenly coated.
Spread the coated turnips in a single layer on a parchment‑lined baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, stirring halfway through, until the edges are golden and the interior is tender.
Switch the oven to broil, place the sheet back on the upper rack, and broil for 2 minutes, watching carefully until a light crisp forms on top.
Remove from the oven, let cool slightly, then transfer to airtight containers for meal prep; refrigerate up to 4 days.
